steps.name: render
steps.plan: 按 bitnami-helm 渲染 etcd/e2e-etcd 安装清单（helm, chart=/Users/zilliz/workspace_zilliz/e2e_src/milvus-helm/charts/milvus/charts/etcd-6.3.3.tgz, params={'replicaCount': 3, 'persistence': {'size': '10Gi'}, 'auth': {'rbac': {'enabled': False}}, 'image.registry': 'docker.io', 'image.repository': 'milvusdb/etcd', 'image.tag': '3.5.18-r1'}）

steps.name: apply
steps.plan: 将执行：helm upgrade --install e2e-etcd /Users/zilliz/workspace_zilliz/e2e_src/milvus-helm/charts/milvus/charts/etcd-6.3.3.tgz -n mb-e2e --create-namespace --set replicaCount=3 --set persistence.size=10Gi --set auth.rbac.enabled=false --set image.registry=docker.io --set image.repository=milvusdb/etcd --set image.tag=3.5.18-r1

steps.name: wait-ready
steps.plan: 等待就绪：sts.readyReplicas == replicas + etcdctl endpoint health --cluster (quorum)
steps.detail: [k8s] etcd/e2e-etcd ready（1 工作负载就绪 · 门槛：sts.readyReplicas == replicas + etcdctl endpoint health --cluster (quorum)）

steps.name: register
steps.plan: 写管理元数据 + 快照，标记 Managed
steps.detail: 已登记实例 e2e-etcd 为 Managed
